metadata.title: QApps
metadata.remarks: EXPERIMENTAL USE ONLY. This Open Security Controls Assessment Language (OSCAL) content has been prepared by AWS for informational purposes only. This OSCAL package is experimental and may contain errors or inconsistencies with the authoritative version of published information. Future versions of this OSCAL content, if any, may not be backwards compatible. Our goals for this experiment are to understand customer interest and use-cases for machine-readable compliance artifacts. To that end, AWS needs your [feedback](https://github.com/awslabs/oscal-content-for-aws-services/issues/new) about the quality and usefulness of this content.

components.title: QApps
components.description: QApps is an Amazon Q Business capability that enables users to create and share AI-powered applications using natural language or by leveraging their organization's data, without requiring coding expertise.
components.remarks: NOTICE: this service Component is missing region information due to known limitation that should be resolved in next release.
